sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23282" key="daknisth/r" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δακν-ιστήρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῆρος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n23282.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">biter, stinger,</tr_> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">μακιστήρ.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
